div1.entryFree: Dauphin (O. Edd. Dolphin), the eldest son of the king of France, and heir apparent of the crown: John II, 425 etc. H5 I, 2, 221 etc. H6A I, I, 92. I, 92 I, 92 I, 2, 46 (the Prince D.) etc. H6B I, 3, 128. IV, 7, 31 etc. H6C II, 2, 151. Lr. III, 4, 104 (here M. Edd. also Dolphin).*-- Used without an article: if D. and the rest will be but ruled, H6A III, 3, 8. Prince D. the usual form of address: John II, 524. H5 II, 4, 6. 29 etc. Quibbling with the name of the fish: H6A I, 4, 107.
